text:
TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

SOURCE: AHC data system 

VALUES: 0 = Did not screen positive for substance use need 
1 = Screened positive for substance use need 
Missing 

COMMENT: The variables considered for this indicator are SR_SPLMTL_SBSTNC_USE_1_CD, 
SR_SPLMTL_SBSTNC_USE_2_CD, SR_SPLMTL_SBSTNC_USE_3_CD, and 
SR_SPLMTL_SBSTNC_USE_4_CD. This field is “1” if any of the four substance use questions was 
positive for the need (value of 1 = Once or twice, 2 = Monthly, 3 = Weekly, or 4 = Daily or
